title: How do I see all info box information across my whole account?
excerpt: Hi all! Is there any way to see all infoboxes in one place like with updates log?

posts.author: Gauhar (Gauhar Kassymbek)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all! Is there any way to see all infoboxes in one place like with updates log?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Gauhar - No there is not, unfortunately. And actually Info Boxes are being deprecated. New accounts don’t get them any more. Not sure if InfoBoxes will become an app in the Marketplace you can optionally use, or if they will just become a legacy feature for older accounts.

posts.author: Gauhar (Gauhar Kassymbek)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your reply

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
